captured_by: test-designer (goal 001 T8b) — expected.*.json derived INDEPENDENTLY of any parser, per docs/decisions/automation-policy.md (auto-resolved expected outputs; auditor cross-check follows in T8d)
spec: docs/regimes/us-house.md (silver §4, details §5, mapping tables §3, fixture selection §7)

multi_row_sp_vehicle.notes: 2 pages; page break falls between rows 6 and 7 — no asset cell joins across it, so no page-break confidence penalty applies

amendment_unlinked.notes: amended row: row_id 2000152831, FILING STATUS Amended, prior-year transaction date; supersession stays NULL and promotion (Task 11) opens review_task ptr_amendment_unlinked — outside GoldCandidate, so not asserted here

conformance_conventions.silver_shape: expected.silver.json is the serialization of Vec<pipeline StagingRow>: [{payload, confidence}]. payload carries every docs/regimes/us-house.md §4 field EXCEPT confidence, which lives at the wrapper's top-level `confidence` (f32) — no duplication inside payload.
conformance_conventions.confidence_literal: All rows score 1.00 - 0.02 (cap_gains_over_200 null, §6 v1 constant) = 0.98 as f32. serde_json 1.0.150 Value-serializes f32 via `N::Float(f as f64)` (raw cast), so the JSON literal is 0.9800000190734863 — the exact f64 image of 0.98f32. Do NOT 'fix' the literals to 0.98; fix nothing unless serde_json changes its f32 cast behavior.
conformance_conventions.details_nulls: Optional details fields are serialized as explicit nulls (no skip_serializing_if) so the (regime, record_type) contract surface is fully visible in every candidate.

conformance_ids.rationale: The PDF carries no ULIDs and conformance runs with pool: None, so filing/politician/regime ids cannot be resolved from a roster. These fixed Crockford-valid ULID constants are the contract the adapter must emit in conformance mode (production resolves real ids from Postgres). Filing ids embed the DocID digits for auditability.

evidence: index slice + retrieval metadata: docs/regimes/us-house/evidence/ (2026FD.zip sha256 e5419282df7a96daa8aed108b72072a57bf909bb2a6c6333c938144f6898ba0d re-verified against the E1 pin at capture time; ETag "3e8597f0ebadd1:0" unchanged)
